title: Imu Steps Out from the Empty Throne
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Crocodile, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Luffy, Buggy as World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.
scene: World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You must have heard, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You know red hair is making his move too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We used to be on the pirate King's crew together, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...circumstances prevented us from going to laugh tale with the others....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now tell me... Way back when... what did you guys want to be?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When I sailed with shanks... He shone so brightly with potential....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I knew I couldn't measure up, so I let go of my real dream....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 24 years ago, the day gold Roger was executed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You said it yourself, didn't you, shanks?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You said your crew would reach laugh tale one day too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yeah...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I've changed my mind... for now at least.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not ready to go for it yet.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WHATA A A A A A A A A A AAT?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But I'm still gonna be a pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're not the next generation's King?! I misjudged you shanks!!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Come with me, buggy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not going to work under you, idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You coward!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you care about following in Captain Roger's Footsteps?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You haven't forgotten, have you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's your fault I lost that treasure map!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I still haven't forgiven you for that!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You better watch your back next time we meet!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That no-good shanks is finally making his move... but what good is it now?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't know why, but somehow, through luck or chance or whatever... we're on equal footing again!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And if that's the way it is, I may as well go ahead and say it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I wanna be King of the Pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Wealth?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Power?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why stop there when we can have it all?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's go for it! Let's go and claim the ultimate treasure!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: G'AAA AAA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe you're deluded enough to buy your own con. Remember, were only letting you keep that title of yours because it benefits us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You think we're just going to carry you to the top?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "We're not "planing Pirates" here!! This is serious business.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You don't have a clue, let alone a plan.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you really expect us to just go pick fights...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: With red hair, blackbeard, and straw hat?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's a scramble for the treasure!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We only need to beat them to it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Let me show you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are some words that light a fire in the heart of every pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And it's because they all set sail for the same reason!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: CLACK!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Listen up, men!!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Stop it, Buggy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huff... huff... what dream drove you all to the sea?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Chairman buggy wants to give us back that spark...?! Oh man, I'm not sure I'm ready for this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Every moment you cling to life might be your last, so why ignore that screaming urge inside you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you gave up because the reality of it was too daunting, now's your chance!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's time for us to set sail, to reach out and grasp what we all desire most!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's time for us to finally go and claim...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...the one piece!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: wood Oooo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Why you....!!

summary: This part advances the Cross Guild and Reverie Truth through 56 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
